strategy: He drops a random Krok Ankh hanging effect (Shield, Trap, Blade, HoT, DoT, or Weakness) on himself or a wizard at round 1 and every 3rd round. Each must be cleared with a spell that specifically removes that effect type.
Do not kill him while any Krok Ankh is active. He revives at 100% health, and that heal cannot be reduced by Doom and Gloom or Infection.
Assign one wizard to track and cleanse the active Ankhs, matching the right removal to each effect type, so the board is clean the round you go for the kill.
Big Balance boss (37,105 health, 179% damage boost). His lowest resist is to Ice (29%); build blades on one hitter and burst once all Ankhs are cleared.
cheatNotes: At round 1 and every 3rd round after, he places a random Krok Ankh (Shield, Trap, Blade, HoT, DoT, or Weakness) on himself or a random wizard.
Each Krok Ankh only clears with a spell or treasure card that specifically removes that effect type; a Weakness Ankh will not go to self-damage, a Shield Ankh will not go to damage spells.
If he is defeated while any Krok Ankh is active, he revives at 100% health.
Because that revive is a max-percentage heal, Doom and Gloom and Infection cannot reduce it.
